globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://connect.facebook.net; connect-src 'self' https://connect.facebook.net https://www.facebook.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.fbcdn.net https://*.facebook.com; frame-src https://www.facebook.com; frame-ancestors 'none';
